extension.description: Alpha testing repository for The Crew addons. Contains pre-release versions with latest features and fixes. For testing purposes only.[CR][CR]Version 2.3.7-alpha/2.2.7-alpha includes:[CR]• New Kids Section with family-friendly content (Disney, Pixar, Barbie)[CR]• TMDB-powered kids movies and TV shows with G/PG/TV-Y ratings[CR]• Eye-catching startup version announcement dialogs[CR]• Comprehensive startup maintenance and health checks[CR]• Enhanced Trakt integration with configurable sync intervals[CR]• Complete adult section with 8+ working providers[CR]• Improved cache management with ETag support
extension.disclaimer: This repository contains ALPHA software. Use at your own risk. Backup your Kodi databases before installing.
extension.news: v1.0.5 (Feb 2026) - Removed unhingedthemes repository - now shows ONLY The Crew alpha addons + ResolveURL dependencies[CR]v1.0.4 (Feb 2026) - Removed production repository from alpha site[CR]v1.0.3 (Feb 2026) - Added dependency repositories
